title: anil cameronii
side_effects: Anil cameronii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems due to the presence of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of anil cameronii can lead to anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. Additionally, the plant may interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions and increasing the risk of adverse reactions.
